global_prompt_must_include: If a command fails or an expected output is missing
fix safe local code, config, or workflow issues
report only external blockers that cannot be resolved locally
route repeated process failures through Skill Steward review

automations.name: Sell In Public SEO/AEO Daily Pipeline
prompt_must_include: Do not use the Reddit API
Reddit API remains disabled unless explicitly enabled in local config
Do not publish, generate, distribute, or draft blogs automatically
Do not run demand promotion --apply without --approval-marker DEMAND-PROMOTION-APPROVED:<date>
Do not use --scaffold-limit until plain apply report review and separate packet scaffolding approval exist, and include --scaffold-approval-marker PACKET-SCAFFOLD-APPROVED:<date>
Do not run demand promotion, demand acquisition, packet scaffolding, generation, publishing, or distribution

automations.name: SEO/AEO Daily PM Subagent Dispatch
automations.command_contract: node scripts/seo-aeo/subagent-queue.mjs sync-completions --date <America/Los_Angeles yyyy-mm-dd>; then node scripts/seo-aeo/check-subagent-artifacts.mjs --date <America/Los_Angeles yyyy-mm-dd>; then node scripts/seo-aeo/build-subagent-dispatch.mjs --date <America/Los_Angeles yyyy-mm-dd>; then node scripts/seo-aeo/build-work-queue-rollup.mjs --date <America/Los_Angeles yyyy-mm-dd>; then dispatch one subagent per safe selected prompt from automation-runs/<date>/work-queue-rollup.md and automation-runs/<date>/subagent-dispatch/ready-batch.md only
prompt_must_include: one subagent per AI citation capture task
one report-only Skill Steward subagent per task
Do not combine AI citation or skill-steward tasks
Do not run demand promotion --apply without --approval-marker DEMAND-PROMOTION-APPROVED:<date>
Do not use --scaffold-limit until plain apply report review and separate packet scaffolding approval exist, and include --scaffold-approval-marker PACKET-SCAFFOLD-APPROVED:<date>
Reddit API remains disabled unless explicitly enabled in local config
Do not use unofficial answer-engine scraping
Do not run demand promotion, demand acquisition, packet scaffolding, generation, publishing, or distribution

automations.name: SEO/AEO Weekly Topic Triage
prompt_must_include: Do not run demand promotion, demand acquisition, packet scaffolding, generation, publishing, or distribution

automations.name: SEO/AEO Weekly Source Refresh
automations.command_contract: node scripts/seo-aeo/check-sources.mjs --date <America/Los_Angeles yyyy-mm-dd>; then node scripts/seo-aeo/content-runner.mjs --date <America/Los_Angeles yyyy-mm-dd>
prompt_must_include: reputable original research, case studies, primary reports, and official docs only
Do not run demand promotion, demand acquisition, packet scaffolding, generation, publishing, or distribution

automations.name: SEO/AEO Weekly AI Citation Check
automations.command_contract: review docs/seo-aeo/ai-citation-query-set.json, run scripts/seo-aeo/check-ai-citation-query-set.mjs and scripts/seo-aeo/write-ai-citation-capture-pack.mjs, capture active query/surface pairs from the generated capture pack, import reviewed rows under imports/ai-citations/, then rerun the controller
prompt_must_include: one subagent per AI citation capture task
Do not scrape or automate unofficial network scraping
Do not run demand promotion, demand acquisition, packet scaffolding, generation, publishing, or distribution

automations.name: SEO/AEO Weekly Performance Monitor
prompt_must_include: Do not make content decisions from header-only or provisional data
require provenance, reviewer, and evidence signatures before recursive updates
Do not run demand promotion, demand acquisition, packet scaffolding, generation, publishing, or distribution

automations.name: SEO/AEO Monthly Content Retro
automations.command_contract: review the past month of owner-actions, run-status, analytics, content decisions, and skill steward closeouts
prompt_must_include: one report-only Skill Steward subagent per task
Do not make content decisions from header-only or provisional data
require provenance, reviewer, and evidence signatures before recursive updates
keep, update, expand, merge, retire, or create-next
Do not run demand promotion, demand acquisition, packet scaffolding, generation, publishing, or distribution
